title: Profile-bound final closeout summary templates

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1239 by deriving profile-bound, final-response-ready closeout summaries from closeout_report.final_response_rendering.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope to built-in derived summary templates; do not add arbitrary programmable templating, repo-specific prose rules, mutable closeout state, or raw JSON final-response output.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact nested packet shape, built-in template wording, required-fact coverage checks, and focused validation coverage.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Finish runtime, docs, schema reference, generated refresh, and tests for rendered_summary.
proof_expectations: Focused closeout_report rendering tests cover terse, compact caveated, audit evidence-backed, and incomplete/lower-trust warning paths.
Workspace contract/lint/test and generated-command checks pass.
completion_criteria: final_response_rendering exposes a rendered_summary packet with built-in terse, compact, and evidence-backed templates.
Rendered summaries preserve required caveats and expose missing required facts.
Docs describe the source-of-truth boundary and keep broader customization out of this slice.
Selected proof passes and the plan is closed honestly.

goal: Implement #1239 by adding profile-bound, final-response-ready closeout summary templates derived from existing closeout_report facts.
non_goals: Do not build a general templating engine.
Do not add repo-specific prose policy, keyword matching, or agent-runtime prompt hacks.
Do not make closeout_report mutable or canonical state.
